name: PUT /api/v1/health/inspection
statusMessage: 1. Test Case ID: Pq0Fba  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `PUT /api/v1/health/inspection` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X PUT -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/inspection
